description: rockport's Aphrael boots are sleek enough to wear to office and hip enough for evenings out. The upper is crafted from high-quality leather with minimal seam lines, while the elasticized shaft and pull tab make this boot easy to put on. The durable rubber outsole makes it sturdy and durable and perfect for the long term.Upper High quality leather with minimal seaming Upper in a pull-on dress boot style with a round toe Dual elastic side panels for a custom Fit Heel pull Overlay detail Midsole Removable footbed with perforations to drain out water Outsole Rubber traction outsole for maximum grip on wet surfaces shoe careUse a leather brush to dust off the dirtUse a leather shoe polish to make the shoes shineDo not store in direct sunlight
